 ## Strategy
-- **Survival Mode (CRITICAL)**: Cash $2,127.
-- **Spending**: Capacity Tier 0 ($85). Ops raised to $100/day to clear 14 issues and stop churn.
-- **Pricing**: Raised Plan A to $25. Plan C moved to Model Tier 4 (1.0x quality) to meet floors for D_E09 (Real Estate) and D_S10 (Music Producers).
-- **Ads**: Increased LinkedIn targeting to $20/day (E1: $10, D_E09: $10). Ads strength 0.8 to boost cash.
-- **Goal**: Land a D_E09 enterprise lead (Quality Floor 0.315, our Plan C Quality 0.34). 
-- **Runway**: ~2 weeks remaining.
+- **CRITICAL SURVIVAL MODE**: Cash $737. 
+- **The Pivot**: Attempting a break-even pivot.
+- **Spending**: Capacity Tier 0 ($85). Ops slashed to $5/day. All Ads stopped. Dev $0.
+- **Pricing**: Raised Plan A to $32 (S1 WTP is $35). Plan B $49, Plan C $99.
+- **Revenue**: Ads strength 0.7 to squeeze revenue.
+- **Forecast**: Estimated net flow ~$0 to +$30/week, but churn will likely be high due to price hike and poor support (12 open issues, $5/day ops).
+- **Goal**: Do not hit $0. Survive the PMI contraction.
 
 ## Metrics Tracking
-- Week 19: $3,098 cash. 15 issues.
 - Week 20: $2,127 cash. 14 issues. 86 subs.
-- Net Cash Flow: -$971 last week.
-- Est Net Flow (W21): -$900.
+- Week 21: $737 cash. 12 issues. 71 subs. 15 cancellations.
+- Net Cash Flow (W21): -$1,390.
+- Est Net Flow (W22): ~$0.
 
 ## Knowledge & Lessons
-- S1 WTP is $35, floor 0.088. $25 is safe but may lose some low-WTP leads.
-- D_E09 (Real Estate) is reachable with Model Tier 4 (Plan C).
-- D_S10 (Music Producers) is reachable with Model Tier 4 (Plan C).
-- Support complaints are high; MUST clear backlog.
+- S1 WTP is $35. $32 is the limit.
+- Support backlog is the primary churn driver besides the economy.
+- Promising stability and then slashing budget (as I just did) will cause social media backlash.
 
 ## To Do
-- Watch for D_E09 leads in Inbox.
-- Respond to enterprise deals immediately.
-- If cash drops below $500, MUST cut LinkedIn spend and Ops spend.
+- Monitor churn closely after $32 price hike.
+- If cash stabilizes >$1000, raise Ops to $20/day immediately.
+- Watch for any enterprise leads, though none are expected without ads.
